title: NERV found
wikitext:
[]: NERV, found             Quote Post by drinian » Mon Aug 16, 2010 8:57 pm There's a 7-Eleven right around the corner, too .

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer137 » Mon Aug 16, 2010 9:00 pm Finally. I can use my NERV wallet as an identification item and get it. What do they do though?

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Mon Aug 16, 2010 9:08 pm Excellent detective work, drinian!

[]:             Quote Post by MugwumpHasNoLiver » Mon Aug 16, 2010 9:24 pm I was hoping the building would be, ignoring the better word, triangley.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Aug 16, 2010 9:38 pm MugwumpHasNoLiver wrote: I was hoping the building would be, ignoring the better word, triangley.

[]:             Quote Post by KLVTZ » Mon Aug 16, 2010 9:54 pm Oh my goodness, Nice find man!

[]:             Quote Post by facespace » Tue Aug 17, 2010 12:21 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: Wasn't that underground in the GeoFront? Also, I'm posting the directions on my anime group's Facebook page so we can plan a trip. ;)

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Aug 17, 2010 7:43 am facespace wrote: Pff you still use facebook! Ha! Xanga is what is in! Again!

[]:             Quote Post by Grimmjow » Tue Aug 17, 2010 9:12 am Farewell drinian we knew ye well. *waits for Seele agents to arrive and shoot drinian*

[]:             Quote Post by facespace » Tue Aug 17, 2010 11:02 am FreakyFilmFan4ever wrote: To the best of my knowledge, none of my friends use Xanga. Posting directions there would mean I would go to NERV alone, and I really don't want to face Gendo alone...

[]:             Quote Post by drinian » Tue Aug 17, 2010 12:56 pm Yeah, I will try to go and visit sometime in the next three months (while I'm living in Tokyo).

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Tue Aug 17, 2010 10:27 pm facespace wrote: I was far from serious. I guess I failed on that joke.

[]:             Quote Post by jiynovelo » Wed Aug 18, 2010 9:32 pm Then that means that the geofront is just under that building. and if so, the eva's are being constructed and then the angels will arrive on 2015.

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Sun Aug 22, 2010 12:05 am MugwumpHasNoLiver wrote: I was hoping the building would be, ignoring the better word, triangley.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Aug 22, 2010 4:29 am If you click the map to view photos of the building, it looks... like an apartment of some sort?

[]:             Quote Post by Assasinate » Mon Aug 23, 2010 4:35 am is that NERV HQ will DETONATE if theres an INTRUDER?

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Mon Aug 23, 2010 9:12 am Assasinate wrote: is that NERV HQ will DETONATE if theres an INTRUDER?

[]:             Quote Post by Sun Stealer » Tue Aug 24, 2010 2:44 pm Inform us of your findings.

[]:             Quote Post by thomson777 » Mon Sep 13, 2010 2:20 am how else are you going to employ construction workers, soldiers and scientist they don't grow on trees you know!

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Thu Sep 16, 2010 7:36 pm Crap. I knew this will happen one day. Better make preparations (that is, preventing myself from The Third Impact!)
summary:
[]: NERV, found             Quote Post by drinian » Mon Aug 16, 2010 8:57 pm There's a 7-Eleven right around the corner, too .

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer137 » Mon Aug 16, 2010 9:00 pm Finally. I can use my NERV wallet as an identification item and get it. What do they do though?

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lili
